summary: Re-verified all functionality of Scribe Board. Text tool fix CONFIRMED working — clicking with tool-text spawns text-editor, typing 'Hello' commits the shape on tool change (empty-hint disappears). All 27 testids present. Pen, highlighter, rect, circle, arrow, eraser, select+transform, delete-selected, bring/send layers, undo/redo state, zoom (in 2x -> 144%, reset -> 100%), pan with Pan tool (grid-x shifts 0px -> 150px), save (download triggered), load input present, clear-with-confirm restoring empty-hint, keyboard shortcuts (p/r/t toggling data-active), and PWA assets (manifest.json valid with short_name 'Scribe Board', sw.js 200, icon-192/512 200) all PASS.

issues: The 'Made with Emergent' floating badge overlaps the bottom-right of the toolbar and intercepts pointer events on the open-color-picker button at 1440x900 viewport. Programmatic click fails. Recommend either repositioning the toolbar a bit higher / left, or shifting the color picker button further left so the badge does not overlap. The popover & stroke-slider DOM exist (testids present) but cannot be opened via the button due to z-index overlap.

action_items: Fix overlap of 'Made with Emergent' badge with the open-color-picker button in the bottom toolbar (badge intercepts pointer events). Suggest moving toolbar up by ~8-12px or reserving right padding so the right-most pill is not under the badge.
critical_code_review_comments: Whiteboard.jsx is ~1100 lines — split into hooks (useHistory, usePanZoom, useTextEditor) and renderer modules per >700 line guideline.
deleteSelected used inside keyboard useEffect but defined later; wrap in useCallback and add to deps (eslint-disable currently masks this).
Paste/drop useEffect captures stale addImageAtCenter; convert to useCallback and add to deps.
Color picker button is overlapped by the global Emergent badge — pure z-index/layout issue.
seed_data_creation: Cleared indexedDB scribe-board + localStorage on test page to ensure fresh empty state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Text-tool fix verified working. The only failing interaction is open-color-picker click being intercepted by the Emergent badge overlay at the bottom-right; the testid and popover DOM exist. All other tested features pass. PWA assets valid. To force-bypass the badge in tests use force=True; to fix it for real users move the toolbar up or shift the color picker left.
